page_content:
Formerly: EDCP1080.

UNIV101 The Student in the University and Introduction to Computer Resources (2 Credits)

Introduces students to University life and current computer resources. In a small classroom setting, students will explore the world of higher education and current technological advances available to them. Additionally students will explore current resources both internal and external to the University, and how to utilize the World Wide Web as a research tool.

UNIV102 Confidence Building and Study Skills in Mathematics (2 Credits) A mathematics preparatory class designed to facilitate a student's transition toward fundamental studies mathematics, including study skills and strategies for success.

Restriction: Must be in uTerp Individual Admits program.
